style_notes: Empty style avoids vocoder artifacts that some styles trigger on Multilingual variants. For pure zh-CN voice, 'serious' / 'newscast' / 'cheerful' all work but test first. Default empty = neutral natural prosody.

avoid.reason: This preset's content is mostly Chinese with bare English abbreviations (AI/ML/GPT). Multilingual triggers <lang en-US> switching which causes deterministic vocoder artifacts at certain Chinese-tone → English-vowel transitions. See references/azure-tts-pitfalls.md.
